nasb.text: When we had sailed through the sea along the coast of Cilicia and Pamphylia, we landed at Myra in Lycia.

esv.text: And when we had sailed across the open sea along the coast of Cilicia and Pamphylia, we came to Myra in Lycia.

cnv.text: 渡過基利家和旁非利亞一帶的海面，就到了呂家的每拉。

ccb.text: 经过基利迦和旁非利亚附近的海域，来到吕迦的每拉。

csbs.text: 度过了奇里乞亚省和潘菲利亚省一带的海域，在吕基亚省的每拉登陆。
